title: Lockfile
description: Sindri v4 per-target lockfile (sindri.lock / sindri.<target>.lock). ADR-018 (per-target lockfiles), ADR-027 §3 (auth_bindings, Phase 1 observability-only).

bom_hash.description: SHA-256 (hex) of the source BOM manifest used to produce this lockfile.

target.description: Target name this lockfile pins (key of `BomManifest.targets`).

auth_bindings.description: Auth bindings produced by the resolver's binding pass (ADR-027 §3, DDD-07 aggregate root). Phase 1 of the auth-aware implementation plan ships this field as observability-only — the apply path does not yet consume these entries (Phase 2 will). Existing lockfiles deserialize unchanged because the field defaults to an empty list.

id.description: Deterministic 16-hex-char id: sha256(component || requirement || target). Stable across hosts (DDD-07 invariant 4).

requirement.description: Requirement name within the component manifest.

audience.description: Canonicalised (lower-cased) audience string. Equal to req.audience == source.audience (DDD-07 invariant 1).

target.description: Target name from the BOM manifest.

source.description: Bound AuthSource (omitted when status is `deferred` or `failed`).

priority.description: Capability priority that won. 0 when no source bound.

reason.description: Free-form reason when status is `deferred` or `failed`.

considered.description: Candidates that were considered but rejected, with reasons (audience-mismatch, scope-mismatch, ...).
